arts.ttl: Tottenham v Roma: Europa League – live
arts.sum: Europa League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Man Utd v Bodø/Glimt | Email Luke Thank you to Mats Hummels for reminding me: this is a crucial game for Roma’s European hopes: “This game is incredibly important for us,” he said. “It’s possibly our last chance if we want to finish in the top eight but we need points anyway to reach the next round and turn things around for our team and our club. It’s a very difficult game but it’s also a big chance. We’re playing a very strong team but we can show we’re able to play at a much higher level.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Tottenham sending scouts to Europa League game – Leicester making trip too
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham are sending scouts to watch tonight’s Europa League clash between FC Midtjylland and Eintracht Frankfurt and will be joined by Leicester City. That’s according to Tipsbladet, who report that Manchester United, Tottenham and Leicester will all have representatives in Central Jutland to watch the European clash. They explain that several clubs The post Manchester United and Tottenham sending scouts to Europa League game – Leicester making trip too appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Bodo/Glimt - Europa League: Live score, team news and updates as Ruben Amorim takes charge of his first home game at Old Trafford plus updates from Tottenham vs Roma
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates from the two Europa League games involving Manchester United vs Bodo/Glimt and Tottenham vs Roma.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou already has the first name on Tottenham teamsheet vs Roma despite injury issues
arts.sum: As Tottenham's No.30 has another month to wait until he can step back onto the pitch in a Premier League game, it is vital that Spurs keep his match fitness up to ensure his levels don't drop too much by the time it comes to the Nottingham Forest match. Bentancur is going to have to bide his time to return to Tottenham's Premier League XI but he is available for selection for Spurs' Europa League home tie against Roma on Thursday evening as his ban only applies to domestic games.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou issues Destiny Udogie and Timo Werner injury update ahead of Tottenham vs Roma
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has confirmed that there are "no issues" with Destiny Udogie and Timo Werner's fitness ahead of Tottenham's Europa League showdown against Roma. Post game he was sore but he played 60 minutes with a sore ankle.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Roma Europa League clash predicted as Dominic Solanke impresses
arts.sum: It was a hugely impressive win for the Lilywhites, and now, all attention turns to the Europa League, with Spurs welcoming Roma to north London. Tottenham will be looking to build on their fantastic victory last weekend with another three points against Roma in the Europa League.
